brand_profile.writing_instruction: To match this brand voice, use the Geist font family and a restrained color palette featuring shades of dark gray and burgundy. Employ a minimalist approach with ample whitespace and thin type. When writing, use clear and concise language, avoiding jargon and overly technical terms, to create a sense of approachability and simplicity reminiscent of minimal-saas design. Incorporate the primary color #1a0f13 for accents and headings, and use the secondary color #65454e for supporting text and backgrounds.

product_knowledge.description: Searchable is an AI search optimization platform that helps brands track visibility and analytics across AI engines like ChatGPT and Claude, driving growth through actionable insights. It provides comprehensive tracking, optimization tools, and actionable insights to improve AI search rankings. The platform offers features such as AI visibility tracking, content optimization, technical audits, and competitive analysis to help brands capture millions of clicks from customers discovering products through AI-powered search engines.

features.name: AI Visibility Tracking
features.description: Monitor your brand mentions and rankings across ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Google AI, Copilot, and more

features.name: Content Optimization
features.description: AI-powered content creation and optimization tools to improve your AEO score

features.name: Technical Audits
features.description: Comprehensive site analysis to identify and fix issues affecting AI engine understanding

features.name: Competitive Analysis
features.description: Track your share of voice compared to competitors across AI engines

benefits: Increase product discovery through AI shopping assistants
Get recommended by AI for local searches
Deliver AI search optimization services to clients

proof_points.text: Generated over £1 million in qualified pipeline from AI search

pain_points: Difficulty in tracking brand visibility across AI engines
Limited understanding of how AI engines process websites
Struggling to optimize content for AI search
product_knowledge.target_customer: E-commerce brands, B2B software companies, content publishers, local businesses, and agencies

platform_rules_summary: 20-30 hashtags; placement: after 5 line breaks; inline hashtags: False
content_brief.benchmark_reference: Similar data-analytics products on Instagram have seen success with carousels showcasing product features and customer success stories.
content_brief.reasoning: With 3 pain points and 2 proof points, we can create a compelling narrative arc for the carousel. The minimal brand tone suggests a focus on clean visuals and concise messaging. Given the presence of a strong stat, we can use data to support our claims. The lack of a customer name means we'll focus on product features and benefits. The 4 features of Searchable can be highlighted across 8 slides, with 2 slides dedicated to proof points and 2 slides dedicated to addressing pain points, all while maintaining a minimal tone and emphasizing the 'Take control of AI search' messaging angle.

strategy_brief.lead_pain_point: Difficulty in tracking brand visibility and analytics across multiple AI engines and search platforms
strategy_brief.primary_claim: Searchable helps brands track visibility and analytics across AI engines
strategy_brief.differentiator: unlike traditional SEO platforms that focus on human search engines
strategy_brief.hook_direction: Start by highlighting the growing importance of AI search

instagram_content.body: Tracking brand visibility is a nightmare across multiple engines and platforms. Your brand's voice is drowned out. Search is changing, and AI search is on the rise, making it harder to keep up. Searchable helps brands track visibility and analytics across AI engines. With Searchable, brands have seen 206% share of voice improvements. Start your trial today and discover a simpler way to track your brand's analytics.
instagram_content.full_caption:
Lost in AI noise
Tracking brand visibility is a nightmare across multiple engines and platforms. Your brand's voice is drowned out. Search is changing, and AI search is on the rise, making it harder to keep up. Searchable helps brands track visibility and analytics across AI engines. With Searchable, brands have seen 206% share of voice improvements. Start your trial today and discover a simpler way to track your brand's analytics.

evaluation.scores_rationale: The copy clearly explains the problem of tracking brand visibility and introduces Searchable as a solution, but the transition to the trial call-to-action feels slightly abrupt. The opening line 'Lost in AI noise' creates some emotional resonance, but it does not specifically name a daily friction or use a surprising number to stop the scroll. The language is generally clear and concise, aligning with the minimalist approach specified in the writing instruction, but the tone could be more approachable and simple in a few places. The copy accurately states the primary claim and includes the proof point of '206% share of voice improvements' without fabricating any statistics.
